summary: Regression testing after minor code fixes (React keys, empty catch, dynamic import). All 7 pages load correctly with no errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages verified working: Dashboard (Próximas Reservas July, shows 0 upcoming), Reservaciones (9 reservas, Mostrar más button with 1 remaining visible), Calendario (July 2026, no events this month), Base de Datos (loads correctly, Conectar=1 button, Eliminar=2 buttons for presets/cleanup), Actualizaciones (upload form + version history visible), Ajustes (Idioma, Moneda, Zona Horaria forms working). Sidebar shows all nav items including Actualizaciones.
